prestazioni: Engine swap to a **BDG 1.8L Cosworth BDA (Belt-Drive A-series)** with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport 9.5:1 forged pistons, Cunningham con-rods, and a billet crankshaft from **TWR (Tom Walkinshaw Racing)**. Pair with a **Holbay Engineering Stage 3 head** featuring oversized 45mm inlet valves, 38mm exhaust valves, and port-matched intake/exhaust ports for optimized flow.

Forced induction via a **Garrett T25 turbocharger** (specifically the **T25 .60 A/R turbine housing** and **T25 50 trim compressor wheel**) running 12 psi of boost, mated to a **Bell Auto Services custom cast-iron exhaust manifold** with 1.75" primary tubes. Intercooling handled by a **Spearco 26" x 6" x 3.5" front-mount intercooler** with a **TurboSmart Kompact 40mm blow-off valve**.

Fuel system overhaul with **Weber 48 IDA carburetors** (dual-throttle bodies) on a **TWM (Tuned by Westfield Motorsport) intake manifold**, fed by a **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** and **AEM 320LPH fuel injectors**. Ignition system upgraded to a **MSD 6AL digital ignition box** with **NGK B9EGV racing plugs** and **Magnecor KV85 competition spark plug wires**.
estetica: Full **Rallye Sport Replicas (RSR) widebody conversion** using **Panelcraft UK** fiberglass fender flares, front/rear bumpers, and a **TWR-style rear spoiler** (carbon fiber, 3-piece construction). Paint scheme: **Ford Motorsport Diamond White (code M7083) with **Rallye Sport Blue (code M7084) stripes** applied by **RS Coachworks**.

Chassis reinforcement via a **Sparco Pro 2000 roll cage** (8-point, TIG-welded, with integrated harness bars) and **Polybush Motorsport** polyurethane bushings for the front/rear subframes. Suspension setup: **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (adjustable damping, 50mm drop) with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** and **SuperPro adjustable front camber plates**.

Wheels: **Minilite 13x7" (ET0) forged magnesium wheels** (original RS1600 spec) wrapped in **Pirelli P7 Corsa 205/60R13 tires**. Braking system: **AP Racing 4-piston calipers** (front) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Brembo 280mm slotted rotors**, paired with **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**.
